mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in industrial production signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in payroll employment above 100,000 signals a strengthening labor market that boosts consumer confidence and spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate below 2% signals a monetary easing cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in housing starts above 1.2 million signals a strengthening supply cycle that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in real disposable personal income above 2% signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts consumer spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals a weakening labor market that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in industrial production and a 3-month increase in housing starts signals a strengthening demand cycle that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the federal funds rate and a 3-month increase in real disposable personal income signals a monetary easing cycle that boosts consumer spending, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
